name: Interactive Tools
summary: Interactive UI components for agent tools: AskUserQuestion panel with single/multi-select options and preview support, and TodoBar displaying animated todo items with status indicators.
goals: Present agent questions to users with selectable options and custom input
Support preview content in question options for visual comparison
Display agent todo items with animated status transitions
Provide keyboard navigation for option selection

acceptanceCriteria.given: Agent asks a question with multiple options
acceptanceCriteria.then: all options are displayed and selectable (single or multi)
each item shows its content and current status with animation

acceptanceCriteria.given: A question has options with preview content
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user hovers or focuses an option
acceptanceCriteria.then: the preview content is displayed alongside the option

unit-test.when: user selects an option and confirms
unit-test.then: the selected answer is sent to the agent

unit-test.given: A multi-select question with minimum selection requirement
unit-test.when: user selects fewer than required options

end-to-end.given: Agent asks a question during a session
end-to-end.then: the agent continues with the user's response

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
